granules.title: A year of status at a glance
granules.description: Each day's color and details come directly from real events and the sections they affected.

tooltip.sectionsEmpty: No sections were affected that day

sections.title: Daily life, separated into clear sections
sections.description: Health, mood, study and art each keep their own status history, current condition and event trail.

recentFeed.title: What happened recently
recentFeed.description: The latest events are gathered into one stream so it's easy to see what changed, where it happened and what was updated next.
recentFeed.empty: There are no recent incidents to display yet.
